rule_text: Refund of revenue claims in AP must be summarily rejected if received: (i) more than 3 months after a notice has been served on the party (for ex-gratia refunds), OR (ii) more than 1 year after the date of credit of the revenue to Government (for other ex-gratia refunds).
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 35(a) read with Notes 1-2
verification_method: Reject EMD/PBG/retention refund applications received past 1-year-from-credit (or 3-month-from-notice) limits

rule_text: Refund order issued by AP Government remains in force for ONLY 3 MONTHS from issue date; no payment may be made on its authority after expiry.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Article 35 Note 4
verification_method: Check refund order date; reject treasury payment if (today - issue_date) > 90 days
